text.title: api-rate-limiting Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for api-rate-limiting as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using fixed window for search, payment, or AI inference endpoints where boundary bursts can cause downstream overload.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A 2x burst at the boundary can overwhelm slow downstream services even when the average rate is within limits.

failure-mode.description: Using the same rate limit for all endpoints regardless of computational cost.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A search endpoint that hits a database and an AI model should have a tighter limit than a GET /health check; treating them equally wastes budget on expensive operations and wastes capacity on cheap ones.
